name: ASUS PRIME H810M-A-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Vertical M.2 slot (Key E) - Support DDR5-6400 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASUS PRIME H810M-A-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x
description: ASUS PRIME H810M-A-CSM Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 4.0 and DDR5-6400 support for budget Intel LGA 1851 builds.
